name: player_zar_write_mission_save_data_section
description: Player::ZAR_WriteMissionSaveDataSection builds the Player mission-save record, writes the current camera variant tag, and forwards it to the ZAR section writer under the local player node name.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ZAR_WriteMissionSaveDataSection@Player@@YIHPAUzZbdSectionCallbackCtx@@PAX@Z at 0x41f5f0 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 72 bytes and the VC object symbol is 80 bytes with 8 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.

The native smoke verifies the Player/<root-node-name> record path, the 0x140-byte mission-save record, selected weapon indices, modal master type, camera target and position, current variant tag copy, and timed-hit relative-time conversion.
